name: traced it
description: A simple app for short text notes, with a prominent timestamp for each entry. Add quantities to your notes using preset formats (S, M, XL, 1/4, 1/2, 3/4) or custom numbers. The uncomplicated interface makes the app easy to use even when you’re busy or distracted. PERFECT FOR - Journaling - Tracking daily routines - Recording workouts - Logging supplements and water intake - Measuring cooking ingredients - Noting simple lab results FEATURES - Add text notes with an optional amount (S, M, XL, 1/4, 1/2, 3/4, 5.813…). - See all your notes with the time elapsed since you wrote.
